channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: jAnakI-2023
item.description: Interview with Dr. Janaki Vishwanath MD [Paed], Fellowship in Neonatology, Sydney, Australia Dr. Janaki Vishwanath is a beloved teacher and superb neonatologist, and a wonderful human being, currently heading the Dept of Pediatrics and Neonatology at Rangadore Memorial Hospital. Shekindly accepted our invitation to share some snippets from her life and times. Dr. Janaki, thank you so much for your time. Tell us something of your early childhood. What made you choose the career of medicine ?

item.title: kamalA parents bio
item.description: pdf source THROUGH THE EYES OF A DAUGHTER the story of my parents by kamala parthasarathy How it all started I was at my friend Nagu’s house in January, 2011. GRP and I had gone there to condole the demise of her father. She showed me a folder containing a family biogra- phy that her brother had written. It contained details of her parents, all the siblings and various family events.
